ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., BioPark) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., park, river gauge) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site for geographical precision */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site for geographical precision */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site, useful for hydrological studies */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the site's information */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the measurement was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the measurement was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the measurement was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the measurement */,
  "well_level_cm" REAL /* Water level in centimeters for the well */,
  "river_flow_cfs" REAL /* River flow rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., valid, suspect) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., technician, scientist) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical data record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement linked to this history */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical measurement */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the historical measurement */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month for the historical measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the historical measurement */,
  "well_level_cm" REAL /* Water level in centimeters for the well */,
  "river_flow_cfs" REAL /* River flow rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the historical data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles the report is shared with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Well Level, River Flow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, cfs) */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the measurement (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "measurement_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the measurement (e.g., sensor, gauge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Validity status of the measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related alert */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User who sent the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "effective_start" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "effective_end" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
